name: AgentDevClaw 首页
description: 官方工作空间导航首页

body.zh: 这里是 AgentDevClaw 的官方入口层。左侧预制代理列表仍然保留，但你可以在这里用更清晰的方式进入官方工作空间，从想法到 Feature 开发逐步推进。
body.en: This is the official entry layer for AgentDevClaw. The left-side prebuilt list stays available, but this page gives you a clearer way to enter curated workspaces and move from an idea to a real Feature.

body.zh: 创建新的 Feature，继续已有 Feature 的设计与开发，并围绕当前项目里的 skills 与脚手架工作流推进实现。
body.en: Create new Features, continue existing Feature work, and build with the project's skills and scaffold workflow.

note.zh: 适合从需求整理、方案规划，到编码、调试、打包的完整链路。
note.en: Good for the full loop from requirements and planning to coding, debugging, and packaging.

body.zh: 浏览 resources/features 里的已打包 Feature，查看版本、依赖摘要和仓库元数据，作为当前项目的交付入口。
body.en: Browse packaged Features from resources/features with versions, requirements, and repository metadata.

note.zh: 优先读取包内 agentdev-feature.json，没有则回退 package.json 并标记警告。
note.en: Reads agentdev-feature.json first, then falls back to package.json with warnings.

body.zh: 创建 Agent 项目、启用 Feature、调整工具权限，并进入一对一绑定的可视化编排图继续调试。
body.en: Create an Agent project, enable Features, tune tool permissions, and continue in its one-to-one visual flow graph.

note.zh: 适合从 Agent 草稿、装配方案到可运行编排的一体化开发。
note.en: Good for moving from an agent brief to an assembled, runnable orchestration.

body.zh: 后续可以在这里继续放项目助手或其他官方入口，让首页逐渐成为统一的工作台总览。
body.en: More official entries can live here later, such as a project assistant or other curated workspaces.

note.zh: 当前先保留扩展位，不影响左侧原有预制代理列表。
note.en: Reserved as an expansion slot while keeping the existing left-side prebuilt list intact.
